===''[[Pokémon the Series: Sun and Moon]]''===
Plumeria debuted in ''[[SM104|That's Some Spicy Island Research!]]'', where she confronted {{tc|Team Skull Grunt}}s [[Tupp]], [[Zipp]], and [[Rapp]] at [[Poni Beach]] following their defeat at the hands of [[Hapu]]. Plumeria wasn't pleased that they weren't following her orders to capture a group of {{p|Oricorio}} and made them leave with her.

In ''[[SM115|The Dealer of Destruction!]]'', Plumeria arrived at the [[Shady House]] alongside Guzma. Upon learning from the Team Skull Grunts about {{an|Professor Kukui}}'s announcement of the first-ever [[Alola League]], she visited [[Melemele Island]]'s [[Pokémon School]] alongside Guzma, Tupp, Zipp, and Rapp. Plumeria watched as Guzma confronted Professor Kukui and then battled {{Ash}}. After the battle prematurely ended with {{p|Golisopod}} activating {{a|Emergency Exit}}, Plumeria suggested that Ash join [[Team Skull]], which he refused to do. Back at the Shady House, she informed Tupp that Guzma was planning the destruction of the Alola League.

In ''[[SM128|League Offenders and Defenders!]]'', Plumeria arrived to see Tupp, Zipp, and Rapp being confronted by Ash and [[Hau]]. She also witnessed Guzma's confrontation with Professor Kukui. Plumeria was later seen among the crowd of competitors preparing to join the Alola League.

In ''[[SM129|Battle Royal 151!]]'', Plumeria participated in the [[Manalo Conference]], where she focused all of her attention on [[Ilima]], the crowd favorite who was expected to win the Alola League. Using her {{p|Salazzle}} in the [[Battle Royal]] preliminary round, Plumeria battled Ilima and his {{p|Eevee}} after they had defeated the participating Team Skull Grunts. Although Plumeria was defeated herself, she managed to seriously injure Eevee, thus accomplishing what she had set out to do in the first place.

In ''[[SM134|The Road to The Semifinals!]]'', Plumeria supported Guzma during his battle against {{an|Lana}}, standing alongside Tupp, Zipp, Rapp, and the other Team Skull Grunts as they cheered him on. In ''[[SM135|The Final Four!]]'', she spoke to Guzma prior to his battle against Ash, advising him not to let his guard down, only to be brushed off by Guzma. In ''[[SM136|Getting Down to The Ire!]]'' and ''[[SM137|The Wisdom Not to Run!]]'', Plumeria watched Guzma's battle against Ash and comforted him following his loss. When Guzma announced that he would disband Team Skull, Plumeria stood with the Grunts in support of him, encouraging him to continue training with them.

In ''[[SM146|Thank You, Alola! The Journey Continues!]]'', Plumeria watched as Guzma and Golisopod trained with his underlings.
